allow: Bash(python -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel\(''D:/Final data/All-Ruijin-labels.xlsx''\); print\(''Columns:'', df.columns.tolist\(\)\); print\(''\\nFirst 10 rows:''\); print\(df.head\(10\).to_string\(\)\); print\(''\\nShape:'', df.shape\); mask = df[''FT Clinical UPDRS Score''].isin\([0, 1]\); filtered = df[mask]; print\(f''\\nUPDRS 0 or 1 count: {len\(filtered\)}''\); print\(''\\nUPDRS value counts:''\); print\(filtered[''FT Clinical UPDRS Score''].value_counts\(\)\); print\(''\\nSearching for filename-related columns:''\); [print\(f""Column: {col}"", filtered[col].head\(20\).tolist\(\)\) for col in df.columns if any\(k in col.lower\(\) for k in [''file'',''name'',''data'']\)]")
